scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts ./src/adapter.ts --outdir dist --target bun --format esm --external effect --external '@opentui/core' --external '@opentui/core/*'
scripts.test: bun --cwd ../.. vitest run packages/tui/test/view-state.test.ts packages/tui/test/adapter.test.ts packages/tui/test/transcript-renderers.test.ts packages/tui/test/pasted-text.test.ts && bun test ./test/adapter.native.test.ts ./test/session.native.test.ts ./test/visual.native.test.ts
